      • nextChunk

        public Status nextChunk()
        Description copied from interface: AdjListArrowChunkReader
        Sets chunk position indicator to next chunk.
        Specified by:
        nextChunk in interface AdjListArrowChunkReader
        Returns:
        Status: ok or EndOfChunk error if the reader is at the end of current vertex chunk, or IndexError error if the reader is at the end of all vertex chunks.

      • nativeNextChunk

        public static @com.alibaba.fastffi.FFINameAlias("next_chunk"),@com.alibaba.fastffi.CXXValue long nativeNextChunk​(long ptr,

      • seek

        public Status seek​(@com.alibaba.fastffi.FFITypeAlias("GraphArchive::IdType") long offset)
        Description copied from interface: AdjListArrowChunkReader
        Sets chunk position indicator for reader by edge index.
        Specified by:
        seek in interface AdjListArrowChunkReader
        Parameters:
        offset - edge index of the vertex chunk. Note: the offset is the edge index of the vertex chunk, not the edge index of the whole graph.

      • nativeSeek

        public static @com.alibaba.fastffi.CXXValue long nativeSeek​(long ptr,
                                                            long rv_base,

        Sets chunk position to the specific vertex chunk and edge chunk.
        Specified by:
        seekChunkIndex in interface AdjListArrowChunkReader
        Parameters:
        vertexChunkIndex - the vertex chunk index.
        Returns:
        Status: ok or error

        Sets chunk position to the specific vertex chunk and edge chunk.
        Specified by:
        seekChunkIndex in interface AdjListArrowChunkReader
        Parameters:
        vertexChunkIndex - the vertex chunk index.
        chunkIndex - the edge chunk index of vertex_chunk_index, C++ default is 0.
        Returns:
        Status: ok or error
